# School of Freelancing — Full Site Index

> School of Freelancing is a Linux/tech freelancing training and remote IT support business based in Bangladesh, delivering everything online worldwide, billed in USD via Telegram/WhatsApp/email.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/) — Overview of training and support offerings.

## Freelancing Training (https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/)

- [Linux Freelancing Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/linux-freelancing-training/) — $600, 180 Hours, 6 Months
- [Hermes Agent Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/hermes-agent-training/) — $250, 20 Hours, 2 Weeks
- [Odysseus AI Workspace Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/odysseus-ai-training/) — $200, 20 Hours, 5 Days
- [OpenClaw Hands-on Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/openclaw-training/) — $200, 20 Hours, 5 Days
- [LocalAI Hands-on Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/local-ai-training/) — $200, 20 Hours, 5 Days

- [Debian Linux Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/debian-linux-training/) — $250, 20 Hours, 2 Weeks
- [CentOS Linux Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/centos-linux-training/) — $200, 20 Hours, 5 Days
- [OpenAI Platform Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/openai-training/) — $200, 20 Hours, 5 Days
- [Claude Platform Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/claude-training/) — $200, 20 Hours, 5 Days

- [Bulk SMS Engineering Training](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/freelancing-training/bulk-sms-setup-training/) — $400, 20 Hours, 2 Weeks

## Locations (https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/)

All locations are served remotely/online, billed in USD, with live instructor-led sessions. Every country below has a dedicated page:

- [United States Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/us/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for the United States.
- [United Kingdom Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/uk/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for the United Kingdom.
- [Canada Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/canada/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Canada.
- [Australia Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/australia/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Australia.
- [Germany Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/germany/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Germany.
- [Netherlands Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/netherlands/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for the Netherlands.
- [Switzerland Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/switzerland/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Switzerland.
- [Sweden Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/sweden/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Sweden.
- [Norway Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/norway/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Norway.
- [Denmark Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/denmark/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Denmark.
- [Finland Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/finland/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Finland.
- [Iceland Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/iceland/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Iceland.
- [Ireland Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/ireland/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Ireland.
- [Belgium Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/belgium/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Belgium.
- [Austria Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/austria/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Austria.
- [Luxembourg Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/luxembourg/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Luxembourg.
- [Liechtenstein Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/liechtenstein/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Liechtenstein.
- [Israel Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/israel/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Israel.
- [Singapore Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/singapore/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Singapore.
- [Bangladesh Linux Training & Support](https://www.schooloffreelancing.com/locations/bangladesh/) — Online Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support for Bangladesh, School of Freelancing's home country.
